name: workflow-planner-codex
description: Codex version of workflow-planner: decides whether a task needs a linear plan or a flat multi-agent workflow plan.

interface.shortDescription: Plan linear work or flat Codex subagent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Adapts the workflow-planner gate and atomic planning discipline for Codex. It produces linear plans when parallelism is not justified and Codex multi-agent workflow plans when flat subagent orchestration is useful.
defaultPrompt: $workflow-planner create an atomic Codex workflow plan
